title: ctenitis excelsa
intro: Ctenitis excelsa, also known as the giant tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to the tropical forests of Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis excelsa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Ctenitis excelsa is often prepared as a tea or decoction by steeping the plant's fronds in hot water, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
